data.title: Goldman Sachs analyst warns that Trump tariffs could drive car prices up by up to $15K
data.description:
Mark Delaney, Goldman Sachs auto analyst, warned that a 25% trump tariff on imported cars could raise the price by $5K to $15K depending on the market price of the car. Wall Street and investors disagreed with Trump claiming that tariffs could increase production costs for automakers and dampen demand by raising prices for consumers.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/goldman-analyst-warns-trump-tariffs/

data.title: Merck’s Stock Rises Amid New Cancer Treatment Drug Breakthrough
data.description:
MSD's new injectable Keytruda formulation offers similar effectiveness to the intravenous version, potentially halving treatment time.

data.title: Coinbase users lose $46 million to social engineering scams in March – ZachXBT
data.description:
Coinbase users are again in the spotlight after losing more than $46 million to social engineering scams this month alone, according to blockchain sleuth ZachXBT. On March 28, the on-chain investigator reported on his Telegram channel that an unnamed Coinbase user lost approximately 400 BTC—worth around $34. 9 million—after being the victim of an elaborate theft
source: https://cryptoslate.com/coinbase-users-lose-46-million-to-social-engineering-scams-in-march-zachxbt/

data.title: Trump to Host Salvadoran President Bukele at White House in April
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump is set to welcome Salvadoran President Nayib Bukele at the White House in April. This meeting is expected to focus on strengthening bilateral relations and discussing key issues affecting both nations.

data.title: SlowMist: A security vulnerability was discovered on the ReachMe platform yesterday, which can bypass the 1BNB payment threshold and send a private message to CZ
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News SlowMist Security Team disclosed that there is a security vulnerability in the ReachMe.io platform. Researchers @im23pds and @T41nk_ found that they could successfully bypass the payment threshold of 1BNB (about 600 US dollars) and send a private message to CZ by paying only 0.01BNB (about 6 US dollars). The vulnerability involves a payment verification logic defect, and attackers can construct special transactions to bypass fee detection.
SlowMist has informed the project party of the details of the vulnerability in accordance with industry standards, and the platform has now completed emergency repairs.

data.title: Binance will adjust the minimum trading volume of SOLUSDT perpetual contracts
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will adjust the minimum trading volume of the USDⓈ-MSOLUSDT perpetual contract from 1SOL to 0.01SOL at 9:30 (UTC) on April 2, 2025. During the adjustment period (09:30-09:31UTC), the contract trading function will be suspended, and users will not be able to open positions, cancel orders, etc. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: In the past 4 hours, the entire network has exploded more than 68 million US dollars, mainly in long orders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coinglass data shows that in the past 4 hours, the entire network has been liquidated for $68.2105 million, of which long orders have been liquidated for $59.7514 million and short orders have been liquidated for $8.4591 million.

data.title: A whale deposited more than 650,000 LINK to Coinbase, making a profit of $3.53 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale deposited 659,415 LINK (about 9.42 million US dollars) into Coinbase, with a floating profit of 3.53 million US dollars.

data.title: Galaxy Digital to Shift Focus from Bitcoin Mining to AI and HPC Facilities
data.description:
According to PANews, Galaxy Digital plans to reduce its Bitcoin mining output in the coming quarters due to a new 15-year hosting agreement with CoreWeave. This strategic move involves transforming its Texas data center into facilities dedicated to artificial intelligence (AI) and high-performance computing (HPC).

In its fourth-quarter financial report, Galaxy Digital revealed that it mined 977 BTC in 2024, generating $22.1 million in revenue after accounting for reduction subsidies, with expenses totaling $11.9 million. The marginal cost per Bitcoin in the fourth quarter was below $38,000, while the average cost for the year was approximately $26,000.

Despite these figures, Galaxy Digital anticipates a decline in its managed hash rate and overall Bitcoin production as it reallocates resources from Bitcoin mining to support CoreWeave's AI infrastructure.
